variants: Jingyi Liao is an expert in the rare artifact market, certified as an Illuminated Relic Broker. She received her education at Yewtree Academy, which provided her with the foundational knowledge for her career. In parallel with her professional work, she dedicates time to community service as a Green Energy Advocate Frostpine, where she advocates for sustainable practices. Jingyi has also contributed her voice to publications through Wander Root Publishing, providing insights into her field. Her fluency in Estonian grammar further diversifies her professional communication, enhancing her interactions within the industry.
